REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONERS MIGUEL CORRAL, DEANNA MICROS, SUELEN VIERA VALE, PHILIP CLARKE, RONAN MOHAN, KATE MORHAM, KYLE MORHAM AND SHERYL SAMSON'S NOTICE OF HEARING FOR FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHAT THAT THE ALJ/AGENCY IMPROPERLY APPLIED "REASONABLE RELIANCE" STANDARD EXISTING AT THE TIME OF THE ALJ'S DECISION OR THAT BASED ON THE EVIDENCE BEFORE THE ALJ NO REASONABLE PERSON COULD REACH THE CONCLUSION THAT THE REAL PARTY IN INTEREST REASONABLY RELIED ON THE PASS THROUGH PROVISIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus & Court Reporter Fee Paid
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONERS MIGUEL CORRAL, DEANNA MICROS, SUELEN VIERA VALE, PHILIP CLARKE, RONAN MOHAN, KATE MORHAM, KYLE MORHAM and SHERYL SAMSON'S Notice Of Hearing For First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
is DENIED. Moving party failed to shat that the ALJ/agency improperly applied "reasonable reliance" standard existing at the time of the ALJ's decision or that based on the evidence before the ALJ no reasonable person could reach the conclusion that the real party in interest reasonably relied on the pass through provisions. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

is continued to March 17, 2021. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of moving papers and reply no later than February 26, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing For First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Nov-20-2020 Continued To Dec-10-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERs MIGUEL CORRAL, DEANNA MICROS, SUELEN VIERA VALE, PHILIP CLARKE, RONAN MOHAN, KATE MORHAM, KYLE MORHAM, SHERYL SAMSON's First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is Continued to December 10, 2020 to be heard in Dept. 501. Dept. 501 handles all real property matters. Counsel is to provide Dept. 501 with courtesy copies of all papers in support of and in opposition to the petition no later than November 23, 2020 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date and department.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR#5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
